title: Couscous Salad
ingredients: ½ cup sliced ripe black olives
¼ cup extra virgin olive oil
instructions: Heat chicken broth to boiling in medium saucepan.  Turn off heat.  Quickly stir in couscous.  Cover for 5 minutes.  Fluff couscous with fork.  Place in large bowl to cool stirring occasionally with fork to prevent clumping while cooling.  Add remaining salad ingredients.  Pour amount of dressing as desired on top and stir well.  Serves 4 – 6.
(May use additional chopped vegetables or leftover chopped meat to salad as desired.)
